steps.title: Identify the defining details
steps.content:
The question asks which choice emphasizes when and where Mariposa Dorada debuted.

The notes specify 2019 and Havana, Cuba as the key temporal-spatial facts.

The correct choice must highlight both the year and location directly, not incidentally.

steps.title: Anchor to precise details
steps.content:
Choice A opens with 2019 and names Havana, Cuba explicitly, centering the debut’s timing and place.

The other choices either omit the location (C), omit the year (D), or focus on unrelated details like materials or scale (B).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
